name: com.pulsemcp/appsignal
description: MCP server for AppSignal — get alert details, search logs, and retrieve logs within time ranges.

environmentVariables.name: APPSIGNAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your AppSignal API key for authentication.

environmentVariables.name: APPSIGNAL_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your AppSignal application ID (optional; can be selected dynamically).
